source.description: Six-panel pencil process contact sheet generated in Codex image generation and saved under drafts/mason-jar-sparklers before cropping.
source.notes: Promoted from a previously generated alternate sheet after owner requested these unused image tutorials be backfilled.

process_strategy: The same upright jar builds from glass construction to sparkler stems, starbursts, glass highlights, warm color, and final graphite contrast.

final_elements.name: rounded mason jar body
final_elements.description: A rounded glass jar body with shoulders, side curves, and bottom ellipse.

final_elements.name: threaded jar mouth
final_elements.description: Stacked ellipses and bands that make the jar mouth read as a mason jar rim.

final_elements.name: sparkler stems
final_elements.description: Several long thin sticks crossing inside the jar and rising above the rim.

final_elements.name: spark bursts
final_elements.description: Small star-like bursts placed at the tops of the sparkler stems.

final_elements.name: glass highlights
final_elements.description: Soft vertical highlight shapes and inner glass lines that show transparency.

final_elements.name: warm spark color
final_elements.description: Restrained yellow-orange pencil marks added to the already drawn spark bursts.

final_elements.name: soft cast shadow
final_elements.description: Light graphite shadow underneath the jar to ground the sketch.

frames.visible_job: Places the rounded jar body, top ellipse, bottom ellipse, and center guide in light construction lines.
Clarifies the jar shoulders, side contours, base ellipse, and threaded rim bands.
Adds long thin sparkler stems that cross inside the jar and fan above the mouth.
Places starburst spark tips on the existing stems while preserving the jar silhouette.
Adds glass highlights, warm spark color, inner rim detail, and a soft cast shadow to existing shapes.

final_step.visible_job: Only darkens the keeper contours, strengthens existing spark color, clarifies glass highlights, and deepens the cast shadow.

rejection_checks: No major contour, prop, marking, or color choice should first appear in the final image.
No frame may darken, ink, color, shade, or clean a feature that was not already visible in an earlier frame.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
